title: Quota Preflight Request
description: Request body for POST /api/v1/billing/preflight. Asks whether a cost-generating action would be admitted for the caller's tenant, without performing it. The server resolves any unspecified dimensions (e.g. optimization_samples = max_rounds * items_per_round).

action.description: The action the client intends to perform.

requested.description: Requested units per quota dimension. Omitted dimensions are resolved server-side. Keys are resource_type values (e.g. optimization_trials, optimization_samples).
